description: Fix 11 categories of README issues: k8s missing from root, aws-ssm fake ?version=, azure-kv false SigningBackend claim, core README put/SecretStore error, bitwarden project-id vs name, doppler missing writable docs, all version numbers, keyring cross-ref, pkcs11 ?pin=, wolfhsm query notation, wolfhsm ?client_id=.
title: Fix all README issues from audit
